easter-cake-teleculinaria.name: Easter Cake
instructions: Prepare the cream: Light the milk with vanilla sugar, let it warm and turn off the fire.

In a bowl, mix the egg with the yolks and sugar, add the flour, stir and then add the milk to yarn and always stir. Pass the mixture by the thin network strainer to another pan and bring it to the fire, stirring until boiling and a smooth cream. Lie down for a glass, cover with adherent pelicula and let it cool.

Connect the oven to 180o C. Barre a hole shape with vegetable cream and sprinkle with flour. Prepare the dough: mix the flour with chocolate and peel. Lay the eggs for a glass, add the sugar and beat for 20 minutes. Add the mixture of flour and chocolate and stir gently.

Lay the dough in shape and put it in the oven for 20 minutes. Rectify the cooking with a toothpick, remove, peel and let it cool. After cold, bar the cake with the cream, decorate with chocolate chips and almonds and serve.

easter-veal-teleculinaria.name: Easter Veal
instructions: Cut the veal rib into large pieces and throw them into a bowl. Season with salt, pepper, chopped garlic, leaves of laurel, colorau, white wine, vinegar and olive oil, mix well and let marinate in the cold overnight.

In the day, lay the veal on a tray, add the marinade and bring it to the oven preheated at 180oC for 1 hour and 45 minutes, turning and watering from time to time. Peel the chips, wash them, add them to the veal as soon as it gets golden, wrap them well in the sauce and let them bake until the potatoes are golden.

In the meantime, wash the mushrooms and cut them in half or in rooms. Cut the bacon into small pieces, lay them down in a frying pan, take it to the fire without adding fat and let them cook until they get golden. Remove and reserve the bacon, add the mushrooms to the same frying pan with the fat that the bacon released and let them cook until golden and liquid-free. Add the bacon again, mix, rectify the salt, season with a pinch and pepper and serve to accompany the veal with the chips. Sprinkle everything with chopped parsley.

edamame-hummus-with-garlic-scapes.name: Edamame Hummus With Garlic Scapes
instructions: Bring 6 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan. Add edamame; cook until soft, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain; refrigerate to cool, 10 minutes.
Combine cashews and 1 teaspoon salt in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until finely chopped, scraping the sides of bowl as needed.
Add edamame, garlic scapes, lemon zest, lemon juice, remaining 2 teaspoons salt, 1 teaspoon black pepper, and coriander; pulse until reaches desired consistency.
Pour ¾ cup oil in slowly with processor running until hummus is smooth; season with oil, salt, and black pepper.

egg-pimento-cheese-english-muffins.name: Egg & Pimento Cheese English Muffins

ingredients.item: Neutral cooking oil (such as canola oil)

instructions: Make the pimento cheese: Puree the cream cheese, mayonnaise, garlic powder, onion powder, cayenne pepper, and 2 cups of the cheddar cheese in a food processor until mostly smooth but with some chunks remaining, 2–3 minutes.
Add the pimiento peppers, jalapeno, and remaining 2 cups of cheddar cheese. Process until small chunks of pepper and cheese remain, about 1 minute. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Heat 2 tablespoons of the oil in a large skillet over medium-low. Crack 3 of the eggs into the skillet, and sprinkle with salt. Cover with a lid, and cook until the top is firm but the yolk is still runny, for 1-2 minutes. Remove the lid, and cook until the egg edges turn crispy, 30–60 seconds. Transfer cooked eggs to a plate. Repeat the process with the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil and 3 eggs.

Spread a thin layer of the pimento cheese over each cut side of the toasted Thomas'® Buttermilk English Muffins. Place 1 egg on the bottom half of each English muffin, sprinkle smoked paprika, and top with the top half.
Enjoy!

instructions: Place parchment paper on a baking pan and spread a puff pastry sheet on top.
Cut around each sheet from a 2 cm strip (round and around like a frame).
Beat the egg and brush the whole surface.
We circle the strips we cut to form a case.
Sprinkle with the parmesan.
Drill the entrance surface with a fork and carve rhombs or lines in the northura with a sharp knife.
Spread the burdura around with egg.
Bake in a well preheated oven, at 200oC – 220oC in the air for 12′-15′′, until the puff pastry is inflamed and the egg is baked with cheese, waterproofing the puff pastry and Keeping it crispy.
We're taking her out of the ocean.
Lower temperature to 180oC.
In the extra egg add the cream, salt and casserole.
Mix and add them to the half-baked puff pastry.
Spread on a layer, the very tiny cut onion.
We make six nets with finely chopped bacon, leaving a gap in the middle and pour from an entire egg, careful not to break (the result is an eye egg whole).
Sprinkle finely chopped chives.

eggs-with-bechamel-in-the-oven-or-in-the.name: Eggs With Bechamel In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
eggs-with-bechamel-in-the-oven-or-in-the.original_name: Huevos con bechamel al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 3 muslos y contramuslos de pollo (unos 450 g aprox.)
Aceite de oliva virgen extra (2-3 cucharadas)
50 g de harina de trigo (3 cucharadas colmadas)

instructions: Cocemos los huevos en agua con sal durante 10 minutos desde que empiece a hervir.
We cold them with cold water, we fight them and we leave them half and half. Let's remove the yolks and reserve them.
In a frying pan we put some extra virgin olive oil and we salted the chopped onion.
When we start to get some light, we also add a crisped and pitted chicken. You can also wear chicken breast, whatever you have at home or what you like best.
When it's cooked we'll get our chicken. We added his fried tomato and his baked yema.
Rellenamos las claras cocidas con esta mezcla y las colocamos en una fuente apta para horno.

We have prepared the bechamel: in a bowl we melt the butter, add the flour and toast it 1 minute while at once stirring. Let's put some hot milk into them and put them with rods to avoid clumps. We cook 10 minutes with medium heat till thick, tipping salt and adding a pint of nutmeg if we like.
We cover the stuffed eggs with the bechamel and distribute them well above them. If we want, we can sprinkle some grated cheese.
We have been at an oven at 200 ° C with high heat for 5-7 minutes, till the surface remains golden.

empanadas-saltenas.name: Empanadas Salteñas
instructions: Combine water and salt in a small saucepan over medium heat and warm through, stirring until salt is dissolved. Remove from heat and let cool for 2 to 3 minutes.

Combine sifted flour and melted margarine in the bowl of a food processor; pulse until crumbly. Add salt water gradually to the food processor and pulse until a soft dough ball forms that easily separates from the edge of the bowl. Add more water, 1 teaspoon at a time, only if needed. Press dough into a ball and wrap tightly with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Cover a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with vegetable oil. Set aside.
Bring a saucepan of water to a boil. Add cubed potatoes and cook until soft, 8 to 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onions and green onions until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add red peppers and cook for 5 more minutes. Add ground beef and stir with a wooden spoon until fully browned, about 5 minutes. Season with salt, cayenne pepper, cumin, and paprika. Remove from heat.
Drain potatoes and add to filling. Toss in chopped eggs and let filling cool down for a few minutes.
Remove pastry from the fridge and knead gently on a floured surface. Divide dough in half and roll out each piece to 1/8-inch thickness.

Cut out 3-inch circles with a pastry cutter or sharp knife and wet the edges lightly with water. Add 1 large tablespoon of filling in the center of each disc. Fold pastry over, press edges together, and seal with a fork. Transfer empanadas to the prepared baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to cool just a little before serving.

erins-canadian-fried-dough.name: Erin's Canadian Fried Dough
instructions: Place the milk, egg, salt, sugar, butter, flour, and yeast into a bread machine in that order. Start the machine's Dough cycle.

Once the dough cycle has completed, remove the dough from the bread machine to a lightly floured surface. Cover with a large mixing bowl, and let rest 10 to 15 minutes. Divide the dough into 10 balls, then flatten, and gently stretch into 8x6-inch ovals (a beaver tail shape.)
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Cook the dough one or two at a time in the hot oil until lightly browned on each side, about 2 minutes per side. Drain on a paper towel-lined plate, and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar to serve.
